task:
In the Blender file open at /home/user/Documents/geo_nodes_scene.blend, delete the default Cube. Add a Plane named 'Ground' and an Ico Sphere named 'Pebble' with viewport visibility disabled.

Add a Geometry Nodes modifier named 'Scatter' on 'Ground' whose node group contains a 'Distribute Points on Faces' node (Density = 50) and an 'Instance on Points' node whose Instance input references the 'Pebble' object (via an Object Info or Object input node), wired:
- Group Input Geometry -> Distribute Points on Faces (Mesh)
- Distribute Points on Faces (Points) -> Instance on Points (Points)
- Instance on Points (Instances) -> Group Output Geometry

Save the file.

verification.eval: any({n.get('type') for n in m.get('nodes',[])} >= {'DISTRIBUTE_POINTS_ON_FACES','INSTANCE_ON_POINTS'} for m in result.get('geometry_modifiers',[]))
verification.description: Graph contains Distribute Points on Faces and Instance on Points nodes

verification.eval: any(any(n.get('type')=='DISTRIBUTE_POINTS_ON_FACES' and abs(n['inputs'].get('Density',0)-50)<0.5 for n in m.get('nodes',[])) for m in result.get('geometry_modifiers',[]))
